command:
printf 'CHANGED FILES
'; ls tests/parity/secondary-release-gate.ts src/tests/integration/secondary-release-gate-contract.test.ts tests/parity/artifacts/secondary-release-report.json && printf '
VERIFY AGAIN
'; node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/secondary-release-gate.ts --format text >/tmp/secondary-release.txt; echo "gate_exit=$?"; wc -c tests/parity/artifacts/secondary-release-report.json
